bolt.guidance: Review the new `.github/workflows/build-iso.yml` changes. Ensure file discovery logic utilizes native bash globbing instead of slow subprocesses (like `find` or `awk`) where possible. Ensure the overall CI execution time is not adversely impacted.

palette.guidance: Review any echo or error statements within `.github/workflows/build-iso.yml` or the test scripts. Size limit failures must clearly communicate human-readable byte values (e.g., MiB) and provide actionable multi-line remediation instructions.

sentinel.guidance: Ensure that `pacman.conf` correctly enforces `SigLevel = Required DatabaseRequired` on official repositories (`[core]`, `[extra]`, `[multilib]`) even if the global level is reduced to `DatabaseOptional` for build compatibility with unsigned repos (like `alci_repo`). Ensure GitHub action permissions remain tightly constrained.
